author: Darko
msg:
What they are basically doing is trying to find morons to buy their vested soon to be unlocked mntx and wmtx and lock it into new pools and using fresh liquidity from us for UNT pools and us as node buyers as exit liquidity.
They give us the torch of unlocked tokens and they take the cash without touching the market. Wmtx and mntx liquidity and order books are super thin and any large sale Into it would nuke it below a cent.

author: Alder Nodes
msg: Interestingly enough, one of the most recent ULOs I helped get set up with a Unity license is getting close to $0.50/day for 4 days now on a 50-50 split licence. So that means his iPhone device is earning almost $1/day. Meanwhile another iPhone ULO that I set up a few weeks ago is getting only $0.20/day. Are licenses activated post-"calibration" getting more than the ones activated before calibration?

author: Alder Nodes

author: Alder Nodes
msg:
For now, yes 1UP is $1 but I don't see why that can't change in the future. 

I've also thought about if changing USD to UP in the app was a strategic plan to keep flexibility in rewards redemption in the future. Kind of like how credit card companies can change the redemption value of their points. 

I.e. in the first year 100 points = $1, then a couple years later they issue a notice saying 200 points = $1

author: Alder Nodes
msg: Yes some people did report lower rewards with vlans but a lot has changed with Unity since then
